instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent rapid consecutive gear shifts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enforce minimum time interval between gear shifts.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor time between shifts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall calculate elapsed time since previous gear change.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall block multiple shift requests within short time.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall ignore shift request when rate limit is active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enforce shift delay after gear engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate delay timer after gear change.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall consider vehicle speed when limiting shift rate.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall relax shift rate limit at high vehicle speed.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent oscillating shifts between gears.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block immediate reverse shift direction.

L4_requirements: IF Previous_Shift_Direction != Requested_Shift_Direction AND Shift_Timer < Direction_Block_Time THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable rate limiting during emergency shift.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall bypass rate limiting when protection shift occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable rate limiting during system faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall suspend rate limiting when system fault occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall record rate limiting diagnostics.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall log events when shift request is rejected by rate limiting.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall periodically update rate limiting parameters.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall refresh rate limiting configuration at configured interval.
